title: Curriculum and Assessment Review Final Report: government response
body: "Background  In July 2024, the government commissioned Professor Becky Francis CBE to convene and chair a panel of experts to conduct the Curriculum and Assessment Review.  The government has considered the Review’s recommendations and responded with a plan to secure an excellent education for every child and young person, raising aspirations and building a world-leading curriculum, assessment and qualifications system for all.  Government response  This policy paper forms the government response to the Curriculum and Assessment Review Final Report.  Progress 8 and Attainment 8 – an explanation of the proposed improved model  This ‘explainer’ sets out the government’s proposal for the development of Progress 8 and Attainment 8. We will consult in due course.  Alternative formats  The government response is available in:   Easy Read Braille British Sign Language   Easy Read  The Easy Read guide summarises the key points from the government’s response to the Final Report for people with learning difficulties or low literacy.  Braille  Email curriculum-assessment.review@education.gov.uk to request a Braille version in the form of a:   .dxb file if you have .dxb software hard copy if you do not have .dxb software   British Sign Language  Executive summary  Curriculum and Assessment Review government response: executive summary (BSL, audio and subtitles version)  Full government response  Curriculum and Assessment Review government response: full report (BSL, audio and subtitles version)  "
